economic_notes: First Nation located on Manitoulin Island, Ontario. Has 14.28% equity interest in UCCMLP (building materials) and 16.66% equity interest in MMPLP (power). COVID-19 declared pandemic March 11, 2020 with noted potential future impact on operations.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Two Government Business Partnerships accounted for under modified equity method: UCCMLP (building materials supply) and MMPLP (power). Note accumulated surplus figure in statement shows $4,934,086 but note 10 shows $4,934,099 — minor rounding discrepancy. ISC funding of $1,381,353 recognized in year per note 11 after deferred revenue adjustments; Health Canada $0 in 2020; CMHC $49,596. Total government transfers per statement = $1,430,949 (federal funding line only — Kinoomaadziwin Education Body treated separately as OSR for this calculation). OSR calculated as total revenue minus federal funding line. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Social housing expenses ($41,663) included within Band and Social Housing segment total. Community Property segment includes investment in tangible capital assets netting offset.
